cta.chooseDescription: Select a public channel to preview its visibility and join options.

empty.searchTitle: No public channels match this search
empty.searchDescription: Try a different name, topic, or room key to discover another public channel.
empty.defaultDescription: Public channels will appear here when your workspace exposes discoverable rooms.

list.title: Public channels

preview.title: Channel Preview

preview.descriptionFallback: No extended description available for this channel yet.

notif.muteDescription: Only badge the {conversation} when someone mentions you

leave.title: Leave {title}?

leave.channelDescription: You will be removed from this channel and it will disappear from your active list until someone invites you back.

header.title: My Inbox
header.description: Mentions, threads, reactions, and unread activity across all scopes.

deletePreview.draftRemoved: This draft will be removed from your outgoing queue.

deletePreview.defaultText: This message will be removed from the outgoing queue.

hero.title: All your outgoing messages

hero.draftsReady: {count, plural, one {# draft ready} other {# drafts ready}}
hero.scheduledQueue: {count, plural, one {# scheduled queue} other {# scheduled queue}}

empty.draftsDescription: Messages you keep for later will appear here, ready to edit, schedule, or send whenever the timing is right.
empty.scheduledDescription: Use the send dropdown in the composer to queue a text message for later and keep control of your outgoing flow.

actions.cancelSchedule: Cancel schedule and save to drafts

scopeFilter.noAccessibleProjects: No accessible projects are available for this workspace account yet.

createChannel.title: Create Channel
createChannel.description: Create a new team channel, pick where it belongs, then choose visibility and room details.
createChannel.name: Channel name
createChannel.projectRequired: Select a project before creating a project-scoped channel.
createChannel.projectHint: People outside the selected project will not be able to access this channel.
createChannel.organizationHint: Organization channels are visible to the whole workspace based on room permissions.

createGroup.forbiddenProject: You do not belong to the selected project, so eligible member search is unavailable.
createGroup.forbiddenDefault: You do not have permission to load eligible members for this group chat.
createGroup.notFoundProject: The selected project no longer exists or is not available.
createGroup.notFoundDefault: The requested room context could not be found.

createGroup.fallbackProject: Unable to load eligible project members right now.
createGroup.fallbackDefault: Unable to load people you can add to this group chat right now.

createGroup.emptyProject: Select a project to load eligible members.
createGroup.emptySearch: No matching members found for this scope.
createGroup.title: Create Group Chat
createGroup.description: Start a private multi-member conversation and decide whether access belongs to the whole organization or one project.
createGroup.name: Group chat name
createGroup.projectHint: Eligible members now come from the selected project. People outside the project are kept unavailable before submit.
createGroup.organizationHint: Organization group chats stay private, but they are not limited to one project.
createGroup.descriptionPlaceholder: Give teammates a bit of context before the first message.
createGroup.membersHintProject: Candidates are validated against the selected project before you create the group chat.
createGroup.membersHintDefault: Select at least one teammate to create a private group chat.

settingsPanel.visibilityUnarchiveFirst: Unarchive this channel before changing its visibility.

settingsPanel.visibilityCanPrivate: Restrict future access to invited members only while keeping the current members intact.

settingsPanel.archiveChannelDescription: Only owner/admin can archive this channel for everyone.

settingsPanel.confirmPrivateDescription: This will stop new self-joins. Existing members stay in the channel, but future access will require an invite.
